completed_tasks.name: /impeccable:polish — theming refactor (25 hard-coded colors → semantic tokens)
/impeccable:optimize — useMemo sort, CLS fix, narrow transition-all
/impeccable:adapt — touch targets, 10px badges, grid icon visibility

remaining_tasks.name: Fix any P0-P1 issues from re-audit

decisions.decision: Added success/warning semantic token families to design system
decisions.rationale: Emerald=success, amber=warning pattern repeated in 8+ files. Tokens enable theme-wide color changes.
Unique 5-color scale (blue/green/amber/orange/red) already centralized in one config. No semantic equivalent.
Intentional brand accent in single component, no clean semantic token mapping.

decisions.decision: Left raw tags — deferred next/image migration
decisions.rationale: R2 not configured, thumbnails have CSS dimensions (no CLS). Migration needs remotePatterns for R2 domain.

decisions.decision: Deferred icon button touch target sizing
decisions.rationale: p-1.5 buttons work but are 27px (below 44px min). Fix affects desktop layout density, better as dedicated task.

next_action: Commit the 16 modified files, then /clear and run /impeccable:audit to re-score. Original score was 13/20.
context_notes: Three impeccable passes completed: polish (theming → semantic tokens), optimize (useMemo, CLS, transitions), adapt (touch targets, badge readability, grid icon). Build passes, 350/350 tests pass. Ready for re-audit to measure improvement before deploy.
